SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:49am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Payment Systems appears through counsel Christopher Dryden with Jordan Schuckit of Payment Systems. Respondent Hedy Kaveh appears in pro per on behalf of Audio Symphony and Triptel. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
This case is related to case 834244, and heard together.

EXHR (A) Contract, Calculation sheet, Demand letter, additional calculation sheet
EXHA (1) Merchant application, purchase order, copy of identification
EXHR (B) Payment systems worksheet
EXHA (2) Processing statement, 2 pages

10:42am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
